text:
Dogman (ドッグマン, Dogguman) is a member of the Heil-Ly Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 

Appearance

Dogman is a tall and very muscular man. His face is hidden by a dog mask that has the kanji for "dog" (犬) It can also mean "servant" or "spy". written on its forehead. He has long black hair and wears a short-sleeved white shirt, black wristbands, black pants, and sneakers. 

Personality

Like his fellow Heil-Ly members, Dogman has sadistic tendencies and no qualms about killing many people or abducting them for Morena Prudo's sake. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 407 

He was excited to see a Floor Master on the Black Whale and appears to enjoy posing for his fans. In fact, recognition seems to be important for him, as he wears his costume while roaming the Black Whale Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 408 and even in the Heil-ly hideout. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Dogman is seen with the other Heil-Ly members as Morena uses her Contagion on them one at a time and explains how her Nen ability works. 

In Morena's office, one member tells her that the butler they left in the VVIP area as a liaison to the Fourth Prince has gone quiet. With four members standing in front of her, Morena guesses that Tserriednich may be on to them and adds that their hideout will be discovered soon based on Gateaume's report. She proposes bringing one of Tserriednich's personal soldiers over to their side, revealing that one of them will go with Dogman to capture a guard. After Matvere (level 21) says that he would prefer to be the "organ", a back-alley doctor, hitman, and Manipulator named Sodom (level 31) volunteers for the mission. 

After giving instructions to the other members, Morena tells Dogman that he has the most important role, adding that she needs him to find what she's looking for. Dogman understands and replies that he needs to level up. Dogman is revealed to be an Enhancer, a professional wrestler, and currently level 36. Morena tells him to go to processing and take priority until he gets past level 50. 

On the twelfth day of the voyage, Morena notifies some of her underlings that 9 th Prince Halkenburg's funeral procession is taking place, and that it would be a perfect opportunity as a lot of people will gather for the send-off. Dogman tells Morena that he is ready after leveling up to the point where he can sniff out people's latent Nen types from five meters away, their ability to use Nen from two meters away, and completely identify them if he could sniff their heads up close. He promises to find the person Morena is searching for. Morena says that his success is a green light at the beginning of the end. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 405 

Dogman makes plans to go, and asks how he should notify the group if Sodom finds the target. Sodom says that Dogman just has to point them out, and he will take care of the rest. They head off and capture Borksen after Dogman identifies her as a Specialist. During his search, he comes across multiple Specialists who can already use Nen, including Chrollo Lucilfer, whom Dogman excitedly recognizes as a Floor Master. After Borksen is delivered to Morena, Dogman continues his search, taking the occasional break to pose for his fans. 

Abilities & Powers

As a professional wrestler, Dogman presumably possesses some degree of skill at unarmed combat. 

Nen

Dogman is an Enhancer. Having reached level 62 with Morena's Nen ability, Dogman's aura amount and output have been increased. He also obtained a Nen ability related to smell. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 405 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Intertextuality and References

Dogman's dog mask is a possible nod to the dog persona of the series' creator, Yoshihiro Togashi. His avatar is a dog face with glasses, and he has been depicted as wearing a dog mask at least twice: in Episode 50 of the 1999 anime adaptation and in the manga Hetappi Manga Kenkyūjo R (written and illustrated by Yusuke Murata).
